name: Candidate-oracle gap
interpretation: Best deployed closure is 0.244220 and mean closure is 0.160601; decomposition shows no omitted aggregate policy closes the gap.
next_action: Move below aggregate policy selection: add per-candidate uncertainty, sample-level no-harm gating, and regret targets.

name: Long-horizon state integrity
interpretation: Best WPU H=25 integrity is 0.964322; guarded sparse is 0.958508, while clipped sparse without projection is 0.201757.
next_action: Add rollout-consistency loss, unsafe-delta rejection, rollback, correction, and uncertainty escalation.

name: Simulator-backed benchmark
interpretation: PyBullet benchmark exists with 2 seeds and background up to N_bg=128, but it is still small.
next_action: Increase seeds, mechanisms, training scale, and long-horizon simulator rollouts.

name: Mechanism-family shift generalization
interpretation: catch_heavy: WPU 0.277778 vs baseline 0.402778; edge_shift: WPU 0.597222 vs baseline 0.472222; high_force: WPU 0.444445 vs baseline 0.458334
next_action: Add leave-family-out training, harder shifts, and mechanism-aware branch priors.

name: Calibration and uncertainty
interpretation: Mean WPU ECE is 0.236226; mean baseline ECE is 0.221034; ratio is 1.068727.
next_action: Add temperature heads, branch calibration loss, multi-step ECE/Brier/NLL, and uncertainty-gated recompute.

name: Systems profile and memory traffic
interpretation: Proxy tensor-byte reduction reaches 0.997454 at mean total objects 2052.6; real hardware data is absent.
next_action: Measure real CPU/GPU latency, CUDA memory, allocator traffic, sparse-kernel behavior, and matched-accuracy speedups.

name: Objectification quality to propagation loss
interpretation: Clean score 0.957711, combined-corruption score 0.821712, combined frontier recall 0.742361. Metrics exist, but downstream loss coupling is incomplete.
next_action: Train/evaluate propagation under controlled objectification corruption and regress loss against report components.
